name: vscode-lopper
description: VS Code diagnostics, dependency explorer details, baseline workflows, runtime trace analysis, and safe JS/TS quick fixes across Lopper adapters, including Kotlin Android and PowerShell.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Lopper does not execute workspace-local binaries until the workspace is trusted.

commands.title: Lopper: Export Analysis as PR Comment
Lopper: Export Analysis as CycloneDX JSON

enumDescriptions: Infer the adapter from the active or saved editor when possible, including Android Gradle Kotlin/Java modules, then fall back to lopper's CLI auto detection.
Run every matching Lopper adapter in the workspace and merge the results.
Use the C/C++ adapter.
Use the Dart adapter.
Use the .NET adapter.
Use the Elixir adapter.
Use the Go adapter.
Use the JavaScript and TypeScript adapter.
Use the JVM adapter.
Use the Kotlin Android adapter.
Use the PHP adapter.
Use the PowerShell adapter (preview-gated by powershell-adapter-preview).
Use the Python adapter.
Use the Ruby adapter.
Use the Rust adapter.
Use the Swift adapter.
lopper.language.markdownDescription: Language adapter mode for workspace analysis. `auto` is the default and is editor-aware, including Android Gradle Kotlin/Java modules; `all` merges every matching adapter.

enumDescriptions: Analyze the package or module context currently active in the workspace.
Analyze the full repository surface.
Analyze only packages changed in the current branch or workspace diff.
lopper.scopeMode.markdownDescription: Analysis scope mode passed to the lopper CLI with `--scope-mode`.

lopper.binaryPath.description: Optional path to a lopper binary. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace root.

lopper.topN.description: Maximum number of dependencies to analyse per refresh.

lopper.autoRefresh.description: Refresh diagnostics when a saved file matches the selected adapter mode.

lopper.autoDownloadBinary.description: Automatically download a matching lopper release into extension-managed storage when no local binary is available.

lopper.managedBinaryTag.description: Optional lopper release tag to download for managed installs. Leave empty to use the latest GitHub release.

lopper.runTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to allow each lopper CLI run before cancelling it. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.

lopper.runtimeTracePath.description: Optional runtime trace file to use for JS/TS or Python runtime-aware analysis.

lopper.runtimeTestCommand.markdownDescription: Optional allowlisted command to run while capturing a runtime trace for JS/TS or Python analysis. Test execution occurs only from the explicit runtime refresh command and requires Workspace Trust.

lopper.enableFeatures.markdownDescription: Safe CLI feature names to enable explicitly for this workspace folder. Lopper validates each name against the selected CLI's feature catalog and forwards it only to its allowlisted VS Code operation; current stable defaults do not require an override.

enumDescriptions: Explicitly enable safe unittest and uv Python runtime runner profiles for compatibility with binaries that do not enable this stable capability by default.
Enable local advisory ingestion and reachability-weighted vulnerability prioritization.
Enable preview CycloneDX JSON export when the selected CLI still requires the flag.

lopper.disableFeatures.markdownDescription: Safe CLI feature names to disable for this workspace folder. Disable entries take precedence over enable entries; an operation that requires a disabled feature is rejected before Lopper runs.

enumDescriptions: Disable the stable, default-on unittest and uv Python runtime runner profiles as a rollback control.
Disable local advisory ingestion and reachability-weighted vulnerability prioritization.
Disable preview CycloneDX JSON export while this feature remains required by the CLI.
Disable stable VS Code routing for preview-backed Python runtime and CycloneDX operations; those actions remain unavailable until the rollback is removed.

lopper.advisorySourcePath.description: Optional local JSON or YAML advisory file to attach reachability-weighted vulnerability findings. Enables the reachability vulnerability preview for VS Code runs.

lopper.thresholdFailOnIncreasePercent.description: Fail when waste increases by more than this percentage. Use -1 to disable the gate.

lopper.thresholdLowConfidenceWarningPerc.description: Warn when dependency confidence falls below this percentage.

lopper.thresholdMinUsagePercentForRecomm.description: Minimum usage percentage required before recommendation generation is suppressed.

lopper.thresholdMaxUncertainImportCount.description: Fail when uncertain dynamic imports or requires exceed this count. Use -1 to disable the gate.

lopper.thresholdReachableVulnerabilityPr.description: Fail when reachable local advisory findings meet or exceed this reachability-weighted priority. Non-off values enable the reachability vulnerability preview for VS Code runs.

lopper.licenseDeny.description: SPDX identifiers to deny during analysis.

lopper.licenseFailOnDeny.description: Fail when denied licenses are detected.

lopper.licenseProvenanceRegistry.description: Enable registry provenance heuristics for JS/TS dependencies.
